All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Admin
Concrete class representing an Administrator in the system.
CustomAlert
Utility class to display custom-styled alert dialogs matching the application's modern flat light theme, avoiding JavaFX's default OS-dependent styling.
CustomAlert.AlertType
Enum specifying the visual styling and severity of the alert.
DashboardController
Controller class for the Main Dashboard.
DatabaseConnection
Singleton class that manages the SQLite database connection and initialization.
Grade
Concrete class representing an Academic Grade or Class stage in the system.
LoginController
Controller class for the Login view in the EduFinance application.
Main
The main bootstrap and JavaFX Application class for the EduFinance system.
Payable
Interface representing a payable entity in the EduFinance system.
PayrollController
Controller class for the Payroll view in the EduFinance application.
PdfReceiptGenerator
Utility class to generate professional Arabic PDF receipts for Student Payments and Teacher Payroll.
Person
Abstract class representing a generic Person in the EduFinance system.
RegularUser
Concrete class representing a Regular User in the system.
SalaryHistoryController
Controller class for the Salary History view.
SettingsController
Controller class for the Settings view.
Student
Concrete class representing a Student in the system.
StudentPaymentsController
Controller class for the Student Payments (ط£ظ‚ط³ط§ط· ط§ظ„ط·ظ„ط¨ط©) view.
StudentPaymentsHistoryController
Controller class for the Student Payments History (ط³ط¬ظ„ ط£ظ‚ط³ط§ط· ط§ظ„ط·ظ„ط¨ط©) view.
StudentsController
Controller class for the Students view in the EduFinance application.
Teacher
Concrete class representing a Teacher in the EduFinance system.
TeachersController
Controller class for the Teachers Management view.
Transaction
Concrete class representing a Financial Transaction in the system.
User
Abstract class representing a system User in the EduFinance application.
